name: Remote Scheduled Task Creation
notes: This rule detects remote scheduled task creations.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: TaskCache Registry Modification match at least 1 times with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 1 minutes after BB:BehaviorDefinition: Svchost Incoming Connection match
conditions_text: when BB:BehaviorDefinition: TaskCache Registry Modification match at least 1 times with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 1 minutes after BB:BehaviorDefinition: Svchost Incoming Connection match
thresholds: when BB:BehaviorDefinition: TaskCache Registry Modification match at least 1 times with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 1 minutes after BB:BehaviorDefinition: Svchost Incoming Connection match
TD_list: APPLY Remote Scheduled Task Creation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when BB:BehaviorDefinition: TaskCache Registry Modification match at least 1 times with the same Machine Identifier (custom) in 1 minutes after BB:BehaviorDefinition: Svchost Incoming Connection match
RED_list: Event name: Remote Scheduled Task Creation
Event description: Detects remote scheduled task creations.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
